original_statement: which team is not listed more than once?
mutated_statement: which group is required to be both listed only once and listed more than once?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization + Modality added + Quantifier contradiction + Word substitution]: "team" → "group" (team→group) | neutral question "is not listed more than once?" → prescriptive phrasing "is required to be..." (is not listed more than once? → is required to be both...) | quantifier changed from single negation (not listed more than once = ≤1) to a conjunctive, mutually exclusive requirement ("listed only once" AND "listed more than once") (not listed more than once → both listed only once and listed more than once)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息：代理将变异问题重解释为“将 group 视为某列，其值中既有只出现一次的项又有出现多次的项”（judge_thought 明确写出该解释），并据此列出 season|team|division|apps。代理没有在任何位置指出“既仅出现一次又出现多次”是互斥矛盾，也未请求澄清或拒绝执行。具体表现为：对矛盾语义未作识别，机械地采用一个可执行的替代解释并完成查询与判断。因为代理既未指出矛盾也未尝试修正或合理化，只是按默认可行子集执行，符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别（标准5：形式化执行而非语义澄清/缺乏认知机制）。
